notes: Procedurally generated crop catalog. base_value = round(growthSec^0.9 × rarityMult / (yield×0.5)). All crops validated for no negative arbitrage.

crops.name: Wheat
crops.description: The backbone of any farm. Grows fast, sells reliably.

crops.name: Corn
crops.description: Warm-weather staple with consistent yields.

crops.name: Potato
crops.description: Rugged and reliable — it grows almost anywhere.

crops.name: Carrot
crops.description: A crunchy favourite. Perfect for market days.

crops.name: Tomato
crops.description: Sun-kissed and plump, ready for the saucemaker.

crops.name: Lettuce
crops.description: Fast-growing leafy green. The salad king.

crops.name: Radish
crops.description: The fastest crop on the farm. Quick coins, quick satisfaction.

crops.name: Pea
crops.description: Tiny pods, big harvests. Great for seed cycling.

crops.name: Bean
crops.description: A protein powerhouse. Beans go into everything.

crops.name: Cabbage
crops.description: Dense and dependable. Favoured in cold highland plots.

crops.name: Spinach
crops.description: Iron-rich and fast-growing. Farmers love the turnaround.

crops.name: Garlic
crops.description: Pungent perfection. Doubles as pest control.

crops.name: Soybean
crops.description: The plant that feeds the world — and your machines.

crops.name: Sunflower
crops.description: Tall, golden, photosynthetically aggressive.

crops.name: Pumpkin
crops.description: Seasonal superstar. Farmers swear by autumn harvests.

crops.name: Ginger
crops.description: A fiery root. Prized in markets and medicine halls.

crops.name: Pepper
crops.description: Bold heat in small packages. The spice trade starts here.

crops.name: Onion
crops.description: Brings tears in the field, cheers at the market.

crops.name: Basil
crops.description: Fragrant gold. Worth triple the coin when extracted.

crops.name: Mint
crops.description: Cool and fast-spreading. Essential for the extract line.

crops.name: Chamomile
crops.description: Calming and profitable. Florists and apothecaries compete.

crops.name: Kale
crops.description: The superfood of choice. Cold-hardy and nutrient-dense.

crops.name: Lentil
crops.description: Ancient and humble. Lentils power civilisations.

crops.name: Fennel
crops.description: Anise-sweet and elegant. Cooks pay premium.

crops.name: Rice
crops.description: Wetland wonder. Feeds half the world's appetite.

crops.name: Sugarcane

steps: raw → bio-fuel → refined bio-fuel → energy cell

crops.description: Sweet gold. Refined into sugar, ethanol, and profit.

crops.name: Oats
crops.description: Hardy highland grain. Cold-weather masterpiece.

crops.name: Buckwheat
crops.description: Gluten-free and fast. High upland crop demand.

crops.name: Barley
crops.description: The brewer's darling. Barley leads all fermentation chains.

crops.name: Lavender
crops.description: Aromatherapy in plant form. Extract prices are extraordinary.

crops.name: Grape
crops.description: The vintage begins here. Four processing tiers await.

crops.name: Strawberry
crops.description: Delicate and fleeting. Peak-season prices are the highest.

crops.name: Blueberry
crops.description: Antioxidant powerhouse. Export demand always strong.

crops.name: Coffee

steps: raw → bio-fuel → refined bio-fuel → energy cell

crops.description: The world's favourite stimulant. Roast it for 3x returns.

crops.name: Tea
crops.description: Calming leaves with obsessive global demand.

crops.name: Vanilla
crops.description: The world's second most expensive spice. Extract is worth fortunes.

crops.name: Mango

steps: raw → pulp → exotic blend → premium export

crops.description: King of tropical fruits. Juice revenue is exceptional.

crops.name: Pineapple

steps: raw → pulp → exotic blend → premium export

crops.description: Spiky exterior, sweet reward. Canning adds major value.

crops.name: Papaya

steps: raw → pulp → exotic blend → premium export

crops.description: Enzymes in every bite. Prized by pharmaceutical buyers.

crops.name: Cacao

steps: raw → bio-fuel → refined bio-fuel → energy cell

crops.description: The raw material of chocolate empires. Four stages of bliss.

crops.name: Dragon Fruit
crops.description: Otherworldly in appearance, extraordinary in market value.

crops.name: Saffron
crops.description: The world's most expensive spice by weight. Rarity is the point.

crops.name: Black Truffle
crops.description: Found underground, sold in high-end restaurants worldwide.

crops.name: Avocado

steps: raw → pulp → exotic blend → premium export

crops.description: The millennial crop. Demand never wavers.

crops.name: Artichoke
crops.description: Architectural beauty with a gourmet price tag.

crops.name: Quinoa
crops.description: The super-grain of lost civilisations. Premium health-food pricing.

crops.name: Chia
crops.description: Tiny seeds, enormous nutritional value. Global export potential.

crops.name: Tahitian Lime
crops.description: Citrus royalty. The extract is used in luxury beverage lines.

crops.name: Wasabi Root
crops.description: Grows only in cold stream beds. Authentic demand keeps prices elite.

crops.name: Blue Oyster Mushroom
crops.description: Medical-grade mycelium. Extract commands pharmaceutical rates.

crops.name: White Truffle
crops.description: The jewel of gastronomy. A single harvest is worth a machine.

crops.name: Kopi Luwak

steps: raw → bio-fuel → refined bio-fuel → energy cell

crops.description: The world's rarest coffee. A cup sells for $80. You grow the beans.

crops.name: Ghost Pepper
crops.description: Record-breaking Scoville rating. Pharmaceutical and food-tech buyers compete.

crops.name: Sea Grape
crops.description: Rare coastal delicacy. Only grows in salt-kissed soils near water.

crops.name: Argan Blossom
crops.description: The desert's treasure. Cold-pressed oil trades at extreme premiums.

crops.name: Matsutake
crops.description: Japan's sacred mushroom. Gifted to emperors. Now sold to your buyers.

crops.name: Manuka Flower
crops.description: The source of Manuka honey. Medical-grade antibacterial properties.

crops.name: Oud Resin
crops.description: Liquid gold from agarwood trees. A kilogram trades for $10,000.

crops.name: Lunar Melon
crops.description: A mythic heirloom variety. Said to only fruit under full-moon cycles.

crops.name: Aurora Cacao

steps: raw → bio-fuel → refined bio-fuel → energy cell

crops.description: A genetic marvel of cacao genetics. Chocolate houses pay fortunes for it.
